title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Tata Elxsi

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Tata Elxsi
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Elxsi:
Tata Elxsi is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi!
